market_context.note: July 18 = Saturday, July 19 = Sunday; scan uses Friday July 17 close as anchor.
market_context.theme: Semiconductor rout week 4; Chinese AI model (Kimi) improvements fueling AI hyperscaler capex fears; small caps outperforming (+20% YTD Russell 2000 vs S&P ~+10%); rotation to value/defensives. AAPL notable outlier +5.8% on week vs Mag7 weakness.
